spec.description: Node reward distribution metrics for monitoring HIP-1357 Block Node Rewards

spec.title: NodeRewardManager Log Entries
spec.description: Log entries emitted by NodeRewardManager — reward distributions, budget constraint hits, eligibility decisions.

spec.title: Inactive Nodes Receiving Rewards
spec.description: Number of nodes that received an inactive reward in the last distribution period. Any value above 0 warrants investigation.

spec.title: Reward Distribution Ratio (Active / Total)
spec.description: Fraction of total reward budget going to active nodes (CONSENSUS_NODE + BLOCK_NODE). Closer to 1.0 = healthier participation. Drops indicate inactive nodes consuming budget.

spec.title: Block Node Eligible % of Tracked Nodes
spec.description: Percentage of tracked consensus nodes eligible for block node rewards. Tracks HIP-1357 adoption rate across the network.

spec.title: Node Activity Distribution
spec.description: Count of nodes in each activity tier over time. Stacked view shows how many nodes are healthy, degraded, or inactive at any point.

spec.title: Nodes Below Activity Threshold (< 33%)
spec.description: Nodes currently below the 33% activity threshold — primary candidates for investigation.

spec.title: Node Activity Snapshot
spec.description: Current activity % snapshot per node. Red < 33%, yellow 33–66%, green ≥ 66%.

spec.title: Activity Level Over Time (Running Average)
spec.description: Running average of active round % per node over time. Each line is one node.

spec.title: Block Node vs Consensus Node Rewards
spec.description: Total hbars paid to block nodes vs consensus nodes per staking period. Each point represents the value distributed in the last period.

spec.title: Active vs Inactive Node Rewards
spec.description: Total hbars distributed to active nodes vs inactive nodes per staking period. Each point represents the value distributed in the last period.

spec.expr:
(
    sum(avg by (__name__) ({__name__=~"app_nodeRewardTinybars_node.*_BLOCK_NODE", environment="$network"})) / 1e8
    +
    sum(avg by (__name__) ({__name__=~"app_nodeRewardTinybars_node.*_CONSENSUS_NODE", environment="$network"})) / 1e8
)

spec.title: Block Node Eligible Count
spec.description: Number of consensus nodes eligible for block node rewards (HIP-1357) per period.

spec.title: Per-Node Rewards by Type
spec.description: Per-node reward amounts by type per staking period. The value on each point represents the last value distributed in the last period. CONSENSUS_NODE and BLOCK_NODE appear together for eligible active nodes; INACTIVE for underperforming nodes.

spec.title: Node Rewards Metrics
